# InMemoryCoffeeRepository

> **Service Layer**

```ts
const InMemoryCoffeeRepository: Layer<CoffeeRepository, never, never>;
```

Defined in: [src/app/service/coffee/repository/coffee-repository.ts:146](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/service/coffee/repository/coffee-repository.ts#L146)

[Layer](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) providing an in-memory [CoffeeRepositoryShape](../interfaces/CoffeeRepositoryShape.md)
implementation backed by the static [coffeeDrinks](#) array.

## Remarks

Both operations delegate to [Effect.sync](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) for synchronous
evaluation and are wrapped in [Effect.withSpan](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) for
observability tracing:

- **`findAll`** — Returns the entire [coffeeDrinks](#) array.
- **`findByName`** — Performs a linear `Array.find` by exact name,
  wrapping the result in [Option.fromNullable](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) so that a missing
  entry yields `None` rather than `undefined`.

Provide this layer in production, development, or test environments
where a real database is not required.

## Example

```ts
const program = Effect.gen(function* () {
  const repo = yield* CoffeeRepository;
  return yield* repo.findAll;
});

await Effect.runPromise(
  Effect.provide(program, InMemoryCoffeeRepository),
);
```
